title: cardamine bonariensis subsp. minima
intro: Cardamine bonariensis subsp. minima, also known as lesser bittercress, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming lesser bittercress include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Lesser bittercress can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or used as a fresh addition to salads, allowing for a convenient and natural way to incorporate its medicinal properties into one's diet.
